title: Yijing Hexagram 62: Xiao Guo (Preponderance of the Small)
description: Hexagram 62 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 62 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Preponderance of the Small. Success. Perseverance furthers. Small things may be done. Great things should not be done.
